commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch stops pre-formatting Discord reasoning callbacks, merges raw reasoning progress before display formatting, tightens `Thinking` snapshot detection, compacts long reasoning lines before italic wrapping, and adds Discord progress regressions.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +117. Total +158 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high-confidence: simulating Discord `onReasoningStream` delta callbacks exercises the current pre-formatting bug and the PR's added regression path. The remaining inline `Thinking...` edge is also source-reproducible from the new regex.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can address the regex/test blocker; maintainer merge-order review is still needed before landing.

target.title: fix(discord): accumulate reasoning progress deltas
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #83983.

Discord progress-mode reasoning updates were formatting each reasoning callback with the display `Thinking...` wrapper before draft-preview merge logic saw it. Since the merge logic treats `Thinking...`/`Reasoning:` prefixed text as a full snapshot, Codex app-server delta chunks like `"Considering"`, `" plugin"`, `" installation"`, `"!"` could replace each other until only the final tiny chunk remained visible.

This keeps reasoning stream payloads raw until `pushReasoningProgress()` merges delta/snapshot semantics, then applies the existing reasoning display formatter once for the stable progress line. The follow-up also tightens the `Thinking` snapshot detector so raw reasoning text that naturally starts with `Thinking` is preserved and appended instead of being stripped or treated as a replacement snapshot. Long reasoning progress lines are compacted before italic wrapping so Discord markdown remains balanced after truncation.

No config surface or plugin surface changes.

## Proof

```sh
OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts --reporter=dot
# Test Files 1 passed (1)
# Tests 90 passed (90)

./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts
# All matched files use the correct format.

./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts
# Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.

git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
# passed

git diff --check
# passed

/home/giodl/.local/toolchains/node-v22.22.3-linux-x64/bin/codex review --base origin/main
# No actionable regressions in the diff.
```

Rebased onto current `main` (`6399b6a4455d0a5373329dc8c71ff4b1da6f50c9`). Signed head: `456cb8c937271263b6e26d24ef76a22dc1d6a185`.
